_comment_guard_003: FIVE-NAME MATCH: {{SERVER_NAME}} must equal plugin.json.name, plugin.json.channels[].server (channel plugins), .mcp.json mcpServers key, new Server({ name }) in server.ts, and any skill prefix. See mcp-forge GUARD-003. Silent breakage if mismatched.
_comment_layout: This file is a combined scaffold. On publish, split into two files: .claude-plugin/plugin.json (the top 'plugin' object) and .mcp.json (the top 'mcp' object). Do NOT ship this combined file.

plugin.name: {{SERVER_NAME}}
plugin._channels_note: Only include 'channels' if this is a channel plugin. Value of 'server' MUST equal the top-level 'name' (GUARD-003).

mcp._comment_paths: Never use absolute paths. Always ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so the plugin works on any machine.
mcp._comment_start_script: slack-cc learning: marketplace plugins do NOT auto-run 'npm install'. The package.json 'start' script MUST include 'npm install --no-fund --no-audit --silent && tsx server.ts' — otherwise the plugin fails on first use on every machine.

_python_variant._comment: For Python plugins, replace the mcpServers block with this shape:

_dev_flag_note: Channel plugins from private marketplaces require `claude --dangerously-load-development-channels` during development. Document this in README.md so users aren't mystified when the plugin doesn't load.
